title: hibbertia expansa
intro: Hibbertia expansa, also known as the guinea flower, is a small, shrub-like plant native to Australia that belongs to the family Dilleniaceae. Its flowers have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and inflammation. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Hibbertia expansa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
